Fester  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 23
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 12
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
HP: +50
SV POISON: +10
Effect: Flesh Rot II (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 49
WT: 1.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ROG
Race: ALL except ERU HIE TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

in price data, i meant runebladed dagger.

this thing is way overpriced. runebladed dagger is like 8k now, which means this thing should be substantially lower. i'd only pay 3k. if that.

it's not even a great twink item considering it's a low damage dot.

RE: price
QuoteReply
# Nov 05 2004 at 1:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591817942072
Scholar
42 posts
Runebladed dagger has a reccomended level of 53, Fester has none. To a level 1, runebladed dagger might as well be a rusty dagger. There's your simple answer why Fester is expensive.

Range skill
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2003 at 3:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776338812
9 posts
It originally was a piercer and still is. There was a bug after the prepatch for Ykesha that changed fester into a range item that looked like a yellow bandana. A later patch has since fixed this bug
▲ Page top
ITs Peircing, not archery now!
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2003 at 12:50 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362281580
1 post
Picked up this weapon for 15k yesterday on Druzzil Ro and it is now correct as the picture above states as a peircer, so the bugs that are mentioned below as it being a archery skill must have been fixed. Oh, and on a side note. This weapon rocks! very nice dps, quick and pretty nice backstabs, cant complain.

▲ Page top
8\
QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2002 at 10:18 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249824524
21 posts
A few points about this otherwise sweet dagger. (a) its not a " triggered " effect like it shows. its a random proc on the weapon. (b) it looks just like a walrus tooth when held. I bought it on the off chance that the info here was right and that is was "triggered" (since the Flesh rot 2 takes like 4.6 minutes to run its course....its not like I'm going to kite w/ it. I had thought it would make up for that by actually being triggered as opposed to random proc). I'll use it some to see if it works better than it looks....if not, then i'm selling one on Inny.
▲ Page top
RE: 8\
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2002 at 12:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781595299
19 posts
lol you thought it would be triggered? Common sense would tell you Verant wouldn't give rogues a triggered very nice dot; dual wield SBDs then use that and you got yerself kiting aka soloing can't have rogues goin around soloing :D
▲ Page top
Fester
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2001 at 4:53 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591771948127
Scholar
46 posts
Excellent piercer, I just picked it up last night. On my server, it was going for 20k cash, and I figured that was a good enough deal considering the ratio / stats / proc.

The proc effect is LEVEL 49, just confirmed it now when I dinged.

5DD,184DoT,DEX-51,276sec

Pretty much a DoT / Debuffer, but still a good effect to have. I think very highly of this weapon, and 12 damage is great for backstabs. I highly recommend this fabulous weapon, one of the best tradeable piercers I have yet to see. Also, it's not only primary, which makes it even more convenient.

- Briktop, Rogue of Drinal

Edited, Tue Dec 18 03:12:38 2001

▲ Page top
RE: So what drops this thing??
QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2001 at 7:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757924826
Scholar
16 posts
This drops of (excuse spelling) foreman mir'tak. this appears to be his rare drop although first two kills of him he dropped it. His other drops are vial of broiling gas(10 charge of lev insta click) and girdle of flayed iksar ac 6 wis 8 sta 8 mana 30 all/all.

oh and a side note this appears to have a level restriction to even equip it. My friend has this for her 40 rogue and cant equip it. We tried on a rogue of a different race who was 31 and he couldnt equip it but a 54 rogue did no problem. So that leads us to believe verant may be testing out level restrictions to prevent twinking.
▲ Page top

__DEL__1591776103303
81 posts
YEA! i busted my *** twinking the bejeezus out of my rogue too! only to have people say, good lord, you spent all that money on an alt? you must have more, give me some plz.
btw, on tunare, i've seen a lvl 52 necro beg from people at the bank. of course after a short while of this i had to put them out of their misery, I.E. CoTH to felwithe, where theyre KoS >:)
Faberin Midgetpunter
58 magi
Tunare
You will not evade me %t_01!
▲ Page top
RE: Nice weapon, Just over look this unless you are in the g
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2001 at 4:12 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Good lord...

It's not enough people hafta deal with beggars in EC as well as every city zone in the game, but now they're starting to migrate here. :/

I busted my *** to get my stuff and my level. Now that I'm "high level" I share my wealth...with those that I deem worthy. Anyone who begs is NOT worthy imo. Begging, to me, shows that you want something for nothing...that you're perfectly happy throwing your dignity out the window and prostituting your honor for phat lewts. I use a ragebringer and a primal velium spear, and as such, I would be happy to give this weapon to a lower level rogue...as long as he/she demonstrated that he/she was worthy of it.

The one thing you can do to guarantee you'll never see a damned thing from me is to beg.../rude all beggars.
▲ Page top
RE: Nice weapon, Just over look this unless you are in the g
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2001 at 5:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361362547
103 posts
i would have to agree with you a busted me @$$ off to get my stuff even though i have been wearing it since lv 20 and all the newbies ask me to give them stuff i dont give crap to anyone unless they show that they can handle it. and very few have shown that they have the guts or brains to handle the stuff i earn all my money in PVP or selling stuff i farm in lower lv zones where i can root and dot it to death and it will be a cold day in hell when i give it to some n00b who dont deserve it............


Heeroyuy Flowersniffer
36th Halfling Druid of Karana
Vallon Zek

▲ Page top
RE: anyone notice
QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2001 at 7:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250911093
1 post
Nope :o) HIE is the Koada'dal acronym. HEF is Half-Elf, and regular ol' ELF is for the Fier'dal.
